mano_cua.result_summary: Bug确认：Select搜索框在中文IME组合输入过程中placeholder未正确隐藏。输入拼音时，组合文字从左侧覆盖placeholder字符，但placeholder剩余部分仍可见（如输入'zhong'后显示'zhong'+'earch text'），造成混合显示的错误视觉效果。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Final confirmation of the bug! After completing 'zhong': The input field shows 'zhong' (composition text with underline) followed by 'earch text' - the placeholder is NOT hidden during IME composition. The composition text simply overlays the first N characters of the placeholder, but the rest remains visible.
